name: MORGAN GROUP HOLDING CO
summary: Morgan Group Holding Co. (MGHL) is a Delaware holding company incorporated in November 2001. Through its wholly-owned subsidiary G.research, LLC, a FINRA-registered broker-dealer, the company provides institutional research and securities brokerage services, including acting as an underwriter. Primary clients include hedge funds, asset managers, and affiliated mutual funds. A significant portion of revenue derives from GAMCO Investors Inc. and its affiliates, which accounted for approximately 61% of commission revenue in 2022.

products.name: Institutional Research Services
products.description: Institutional research and securities brokerage executed on an agency basis for hedge funds, asset managers, and affiliated mutual funds.

products.name: Underwriting Services
products.description: Participation in underwriting syndicates and selling groups for securities offerings, including as placement agent.

partnerships.description: GAMCO and affiliates accounted for approximately 61% of G.research commission revenue in 2022.
Transition services agreement with AC post spin-off; AC was former parent that distributed Morgan Group shares in 2020.
